user.title: Plant Care setup
user.description: One-time setup. Plants are added later from the panel.

init.title: Plant Care reminders
init.description: Automatic reminders when a plant needs water or fertilizer. Leave the notify service empty to disable.

data.rate_limit_hours: Minimum hours between reminders for the same plant

add_plant.name: Add plant
add_plant.description: Creates a new plant and returns its ID.

update_plant.name: Update plant
update_plant.description: Updates fields of an existing plant.

plant_id.name: Plant ID
plant_id.description: ID of the plant to update

plant_id.name: Plant ID
plant_id.description: ID of the plant to remove

water_plant.name: Mark as watered
water_plant.description: Marks the plant as watered now.

fertilize_plant.name: Mark as fertilized
fertilize_plant.description: Marks the plant as fertilized now.

send_reminders.name: Send reminders now
send_reminders.description: Evaluates all plants and sends notifications via the configured notify service. Respects quiet hours and rate limit unless 'force' is set.

force.name: Force
force.description: Ignore quiet hours and rate limit
